privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the real-world Bologna Pasubio dataset from the Eclipse SUMO project. The scenario directory is confirmed to be /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio. The expected output filenames (patch.nod.xml, pasubio_allway.net.xml, run_allway.sumocfg, and tripinfos_allway.xml) correctly match the evaluation assertions in export_result.sh.
